jsonLd.title: Borosil is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Borosil are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Borosil:
Borosil is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Borosil!
